creator: dewayne@heuristicsystems.com.au
text: I've closed this PR as Konstantin has provided a fix for the crashes, which has been incorporated into Stable.  Though I should note that I haven't yet pinned down why an i386 jail on an amd64 platform seems to hang when run at a nice priority. (no other clues so far) This is on FreeBSD 11.2-STABLE  r336359M  i386 1102501 1102501
